---
title: "Planificación"
sidebar: false
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(pander)
```

## Forma general de funcionamiento

Este curso se compone de tres actividades principales a la semana:

-   <i class="fas fa-chalkboard-teacher"></i> [**Clases lectivas presenciales**](): los jueves de 14:30 a 16:00 en Sala 34, donde en base a las lecturas correspondientes a esa semana se presentará un resumen de los contenidos principales y se resolverán dudas.

-   <i class="fas fa-user-edit"></i> [**Talleres prácticos**](): Jueves seguido a las clases lectivas, de 16:15 a 17:45 en sala 45 (computación).

-   <i class="fas fa-book-reader"></i> [**Lecturas**](): cada sesión lectiva tiene una lectura obligatoria asignada a la semana, la que se encuentra a disposición en esta página.

<br>

+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                         | <i class="fas fa-chalkboard-teacher"></i> Contenidos                                                              | <i class="fas fa-user-edit"></i> Prácticas y evaluaciones                                                    | <i class="fas fa-book-reader"></i> Lecturas y links                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |

| <font color="orange"> **MARZO** </font> |                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 12                                      | [**1. Presentación**](/class/01-class) <br> - Programa y forma de trabajo <br/> - La crisis de la ciencia cerrada | [Película Paywall](https://amara.org/en/videos/nTk5qVME6PP7/es/2350702/)                                     | [Nosek, B. A. et al (2015). Promoting an open research culture. Science, 348(6242), 1422–1425.](https://doi.org/10.1126/science.aab2374)                                                                                                                               |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 19                                      | **2. Ciencia Abierta y Reproducibilidad** <br> • principios <br> • problemas <br> • alternativas                  | -   Taller VSC                                                                                               | -   [Nassi-Calo (2014) La reproducibilidad en los resultados de investi\|gación](http://blog.scielo.org/es/2014/02/27/la-reproducibilidad-en-los-resultados-de-investigacion-la-punta-del-iceberg/)                                                                    |
|                                         |                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                         |                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                              | -   [Fardella et al (2020) Escribir papers bajo el régimen del management académico: Cuerpo, afectos y estrategias](/docs/fardella2020escribirpapers.pdf)                                                                                                              |
|                                         |                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                         |                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                              | -   [Christensen et al cap2: What is ethical research](/docs/CAP2%20Christensen%20et%20al%20(2019)%20Transparent%20and%20Reproducible%20Social%20Science%20Research.pdf)                                                                                               |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 26                                      | **3[. Escritura en texto plano](/class/05-class)**                                                                | [Práctica Markdown](/assignment/02-code)                                                                     | -   [Healey (2019) The Plain Person’s Guide to Plain Text Social S\|cience](https://plain-text.co/)                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                                         |                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                         |                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                              | -   [Introducción a Markdown](http://rusersgroup.com/blog/rmarkdown)                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                                         |                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                         |                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                              | -   [Capítulo Lenguaje reproducible, secciones 1.1 y 1.2, libro Investigación Social Abierta](https://juancarloscastillo.github.io/in-socabi/lenguaje-reproducible.html)                                                                                               |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| <font color="orange"> **ABRIL** </font> |                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 2                                       | 4.  Zotero y citas en texto plano (Bibtex)                                                                        | Práctica Zotero, Bibtex y Betterbibtex                                                                       | -   [Zotero](https://www.zotero.org/)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 9                                       | [5. Documentos dinámicos](/slides/06-rmarkdown/06_rmarkdown.html)                                                 | [Práctica RMarkdown/Knitr]()                                                                                 | -   [Bowers & Voors (2016) How to improve your relationship with your future self](https://scielo.conicyt.cl/pdf/revcipol/v36n3/art11.pdf)                                                                                                                             |
|                                         |                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                         |                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                              | <!-- -->                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                                         |                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                         |                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                              | -   [Hoja referencia Rmarkdown](https://rstudio.com/wp-content/uploads/2015/03/rmarkdown-spanish.pdf)                                                                                                                                                                  |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 16                                      | [**6. Flujo de trabajo reproducible / Protocolo IPO**](/class/07-class)                                           |                                                                                                              | -   [IPO](https://juancarloscastillo.github.io/ipo/)                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                                         |                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                         |                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                              | -   [TIER](https://www.projecttier.org/)                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 23                                      | 7.  Documentos en Quarto                                                                                          | [Asesorías informe 1: Reporte dinámico reproducible](/programa/#entrega-2-30-reporte-dinámico-reproduciblee) |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 30                                      | [**8. Control de versiones: Git**](/class/08-class)                                                               | <font color="red"> **Entrega informe 1** </font>                                                             | -   [Git](https://git-scm.com/)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| <font color="orange"> **MAYO** </font>  |                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 07                                      | [**9. Github**](/class/09-class)                                                                                  | Práctica Gihub <br>                                                                                          | [Github](https://github.com/)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 14                                      | 10. Github pages                                                                                                  |                                                                                                              | [Github pages](https://pages.github.com/)                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 21                                      | FERIADO / Semana de receso                                                                                        |                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 28                                      | 11\. Presentaciones en Quarto                                                                                     |                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| <font color="orange"> **JUNIO** </font> |                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 04                                      | 12\. Quarto websites y Quarto Book                                                                                |                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 11                                      | [**13. Pre-registros y pre-prints**]()                                                                            | [OSF](https://osf.io/) y [Pre-prints/Socarxiv](https://socopen.org/)                                         | -   [García-Garzón et al (2018) Estudios de replicación, pre-registros y ciencia abierta en Psicología](/docs/ciencia_abierta_psicologia.pdf) <br><br> [Yamada 2018 How to Crack Pre-registration](https://www.frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/fpsyg.2018.01831/full) |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 18                                      | **14[. Datos Abiertos]()**                                                                                        | [Asesoría Informe 2: Proyecto Abierto](/programa/#entrega-3-50-proyecto-abierto)                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 25                                      | [**15. Acceso y publicación**](/class/10-class)                                                                   | <font color="red"> **Entrega informe 2** </font>                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                         |                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+-----------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
